subcodes.first_line: O handmaiden of God! Thy prose was heard, and the verses which thou didst send attained unto the honor of being graciously heard. Blessed art thou [3.5s]
subcodes.first_line_orig: ای امه الله نثرت شنیده شد و نظمی هم که فرستادی به شرف اصغا فائز گشت طوبی از برای
subcodes.subjects: @living waters; water of life, @praise and encouragement, @thankfulness; gratitude, @spiritual emotions and susceptibilities, @the concourse on high, @rejection, opposition and persecution
